bootstrap.assetLoadFailed: Required icon font failed to load.
bootstrap.adbHint: For a USB-connected Android device, run adb reverse tcp:8081 tcp:8081.

import.title: Import
import.subtitle: Share a WhatsApp export ZIP here or choose it manually.
import.heroBody: Save exported media as real Android files with their original WhatsApp dates.
import.infoLocalBody: Files are processed on this device. No accounts, cloud upload, or server APIs.
import.infoShareBody: WhatsApp > Export chat > Include media > Share to this app.
import.infoPermReadyBody: All files access is already granted for saving.
import.infoPermLaterBody: When you are ready to save, Android will ask for all files access so file dates can be preserved.
import.instructionBody: In WhatsApp, open the chat, export it with media included, then either share the ZIP here or choose it manually.
import.sharedFileCouldNotOpen: The shared file could not be opened. Please select the ZIP from storage.

language.title: Choose your app language before starting the workflow.
language.body: Switch between system language, English, or Hebrew. Layout direction updates immediately when needed.
language.note: You can change this later in Settings at any time.
language.highlightOne: Apply text language immediately across onboarding and the app.
language.highlightTwo: Apply RTL/LTR direction changes without a manual full refresh.
language.highlightThree: Use Android app-language settings later if you prefer.

welcome.title: Restore the original WhatsApp dates for exported photos, videos, and media.
welcome.body: Bring exported WhatsApp media back into the right timeline with a calmer, cleaner save flow built for Android.
welcome.note: The onboarding only appears on first launch, and you can reopen it later from Settings.
welcome.highlightOne: Bring photos, videos, voice notes, stickers, and more back into order.
welcome.highlightTwo: Keep the process focused on the media you actually want to save.
welcome.highlightThree: Start from a shared ZIP or choose one manually when you're ready.

importZip.title: Import a WhatsApp export ZIP and let the app detect the original media dates.
importZip.body: Choose a WhatsApp export ZIP or share it straight into the app. The transcript is detected automatically, then each supported file is matched to its original message time.
importZip.note: Large ZIP files stay in the native extraction path so the app does not load the whole archive into JavaScript memory.
importZip.highlightOne: Open a ZIP from storage or share it directly from WhatsApp.
importZip.highlightTwo: Find the chat transcript automatically without manual browsing.
importZip.highlightThree: Match media to the original WhatsApp timestamps before saving.

chooseSave.title: Choose exactly what you want to keep — photos, videos, voice notes, stickers, and more.
chooseSave.body: Filter by sender, narrow down media types, preview files, and keep the export organized before anything is written out.
chooseSave.note: You stay in control of what gets saved and how it is grouped.
chooseSave.highlightOne: Filter the export by sender before saving.
chooseSave.highlightTwo: Keep only the media categories you want.
chooseSave.highlightThree: Preview files first so the final save feels intentional.

restoreDates.title: Save media with the original WhatsApp dates so it appears in the right order.
restoreDates.body: The app saves real Android files using the original WhatsApp message dates, then lets Android index them so Gallery apps can recognize the timeline correctly.
restoreDates.highlightOne: Keep exported media closer to the order you expect in Gallery.
restoreDates.highlightTwo: Use the app's date-preserving save path instead of a generic import.
restoreDates.highlightThree: Leave chats, media, and history on this device only.

permission.title: Grant access so the app can import ZIPs smoothly and save media back with the right dates.
permission.body: To save exported media with the original WhatsApp dates, the app needs Android file access right before you enter the main app. Nothing is uploaded anywhere.
permission.note: If you continue without access, importing and saving can be limited until you turn it on later in Settings.
permission.highlightOne: Import WhatsApp ZIP files from storage when needed.
permission.highlightTwo: Save exported media with the app's date-preserving Android flow.
permission.highlightThree: Grant access now or come back later from Settings.

checking.title: Checking current access
checking.body: The app is checking whether Android access is already ready.

pending.title: Access is still needed
pending.body: Grant access to import ZIPs from storage more smoothly and save media with the most reliable date-preserving flow.

granted.title: Access is ready
granted.body: You're all set. The main app can use the same Android access flow that preserves saved file dates.

limited.title: You can continue, with limits
limited.body: Some import or save actions may not work fully until access is granted later from Settings.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Save location, output folders, language, and appearance.
settings.defaultAccurateFolderBody: Best option for preserving WhatsApp dates in the public Pictures folder.
settings.customFolderBody: Use Android's folder picker to choose a different destination.
settings.chooseFolderAlert: Custom folder picking is not reliable for timestamp-preserving public folders yet. The default public Pictures folder remains active.
settings.customFolderDateAccuracyReady: Exact file timestamp support was verified for this folder.
settings.customFolderDateAccuracyLimited: Saving works here, but exact timestamp preservation was not verified by Android SAF.
settings.outputOrgSubtitle: Choose how exported files are arranged inside the destination.
settings.outputOrgFooter: The same organization mode is used for both the default accurate folder and custom SAF folders.

all-in-one.title: Everything in one folder
all-in-one.body: All exported files stay together in a single folder.

by-type.title: All people together, file types separated
by-type.body: Media is grouped into folders like Media, Voice notes, Stickers, Documents, and Other.

by-sender.title: Separate by sender, everything together per sender
by-sender.body: Each sender gets one folder with all their files inside it.

by-sender-and-type.title: Separate by sender, and by type inside each sender
by-sender-and-type.body: Each sender gets their own folder, with subfolders for media type.

settings.languageInfo: Android 13+ can show this app in the official per-app language settings. English and Hebrew resources are declared.

languageBodies.system: The app follows the device language.
languageBodies.he: Show the interface in Hebrew with right-to-left layout.

settings.languageSystemFallback: Use system settings to change this app language.
settings.languageSettingsFallbackOpened: Android app-language settings were unavailable, so system settings were opened instead.
settings.dynamicColorsBody: When supported, Android system colors influence the app palette.

appearanceBodies.system: The app follows the device appearance.
appearanceBodies.light: Warm bright background with soft cards.
appearanceBodies.dark: Warm dark background with readable text.

settings.welcomeTourBody: Replay the polished first-launch introduction and access guidance at any time.
settings.developerModeBody: Developer mode reveals diagnostics, technical details, and debug-only actions.
settings.clearCacheBody: Temporary ZIP extraction files and previews will be removed.
settings.clearHistoryBody: This removes saved history entries from the app. Exported files stay on the device.
settings.shareDiagValue: Available when developer mode is enabled.
settings.restartRequiredBody: To apply the Right-to-Left layout change correctly, please restart the app.

reviewSave.title: Review & Save
reviewSave.subtitle: One last check before copying files with original timestamps.
reviewSave.originalDates: Original WhatsApp dates will be restored
reviewSave.appWillUse: The app will use file timestamps and Android media scan for photos/videos. Other selected files are copied into organized folders.

outputOptions.title: Save Options
outputOptions.subtitle: Choose where to save and how to organize the files.
outputOptions.notReadyTitle: One detail is needed before saving.
outputOptions.disabledNoSelection: Select at least one item to save.
outputOptions.disabledChooseFolder: Choose a destination folder to continue
outputOptions.disabledPermission: Save permission is required to continue
outputOptions.defaultAccurateFolderBody: Save to the phone's public Pictures folder, using the most reliable date-preserving path.
outputOptions.customFolderBody: A destination selected through Android's file manager.
outputOptions.accurateModeBody: The app writes real files, sets their original WhatsApp date, then asks Android to scan them.

all-in-one.title: One folder
all-in-one.body: All files will be saved together.

by-type.title: By file type
by-type.body: Photos and videos will be separated into folders.

by-sender.title: By sender
by-sender.body: Each sender gets their own folder.

by-sender-and-type.title: By sender and type
by-sender-and-type.body: The most organized split for larger chats.

outputOptions.createExportTimestampFolderBody: Helps keep separate save runs apart.

keep-both.title: Keep another copy
keep-both.body: Existing files are not deleted or replaced.

skip-existing.title: Skip existing
skip-existing.body: If a file already exists, a new copy will not be saved.

replace-existing.title: Replace existing
replace-existing.body: An existing file with the same name will be replaced.

outputOptions.granted: Granted. The app can preserve file dates while saving.
outputOptions.needed: Needed to write real files and preserve their original WhatsApp dates.
outputOptions.customFolderSupportReady: The selected folder was writable and Android reported timestamp support.
outputOptions.customFolderSupportLimited: Saving works, but Android SAF did not verify exact timestamp preservation here.
outputOptions.previewBody: This preview shows how the current destination and folder organization will look when saving starts.
outputOptions.otherFilesBody: Only photos and videos are guaranteed to appear in Gallery. Other files are saved to folders.

fileSelection.title: Choose Media
fileSelection.subtitle: Choose the photos and videos you want to save with restored dates.
fileSelection.otherExplanation: Other files are not photos or videos, such as documents, system files, or unknown file types.
fileSelection.filterSubtitle: Choose which files appear in the list.
fileSelection.sortSubtitle: Choose the order for the file list.
fileSelection.saveableOnly: Only show files that can be saved
fileSelection.saveableOnlyBody: Hides files unsupported by the current save flow.
fileSelection.disabledNoSelection: Choose at least one file to continue.
fileSelection.galleryNote: Only photos and videos are guaranteed to appear in Gallery. Other files are saved to folders.
fileSelection.emptyStateBody: Try another search, category, or sender.
fileSelection.videoPreviewFailed: Video preview could not load on this device.
fileSelection.savedToFolderWithDate: Saved to folder with file date

processing.analyzeSubtitle: Checking the ZIP and matching exported media to chat messages.
processing.savingSubtitle: Saving selected media with original WhatsApp file dates.
processing.waitUntilDone: Please wait until this step finishes.
processing.keepOpenBody: Keep the app open until saving finishes.

progressLabels.zipReceived: ZIP received from Android share sheet
progressLabels.savingFiles: Copying files, setting filesystem timestamps, then scanning

results.title: Results
results.headlineAllGood: Files are ready in the destination folder with restored dates.
results.headlineIssues: Saved with some items needing attention.
results.startOverBody: This will clear the current results and return to import.
results.folderPathCopied: Folder path copied. Open My Files > Internal storage > Pictures > chatStamp.
results.openGalleryFallback: Open Gallery and look for chatStamp. Folder path copied.
results.openFolderFallbackTitle: Folder opening depends on your device
results.shareOutputFilesBody: Choose which files to share from the latest save.
results.shareFailed: No share target could be opened.
results.allReady: Saved files are ready in the destination folder.
results.someNeedReview: Some files may still need manual review in Gallery or Files.

history.title: History
history.subtitle: Past saves and exports.
history.openFolderFallback: Android could not open the exact folder. Open your Files app and browse to the saved export folder.
history.shareFilesBody: Choose which saved categories to share from this history item.
history.deleteRecordBody: This removes the record from the app history. Exported files stay on the device.
history.deleteFilesBody: This removes the history record and also tries to delete the exported files from storage.

summary.title: Summary & Filters
summary.subtitle: Review what was found and choose the categories and senders to include.

review.title: Review import
review.subtitle: Review the selection before saving. Technical details stay tucked away until needed.
review.technicalSummaryBody: Helper information about ZIP entries that did not need extraction.
review.mediaTypesBody: Choose which file types to include in the save.
review.videoWarning: Videos may still appear by import time unless MP4 metadata correction is supported.
review.selectionReadyBody: You can continue saving with the current selection.
review.selectionEmptyBody: Choose at least one file from the list to continue.
review.sendersBody: Selected senders will be included in the save.
review.footerReason: Choose at least one item to continue

capabilities.videoSupportedAfterVerification: Video date fix supported only after Android verification passes

error.permissionReason: Android has not granted the storage access needed to preserve file dates.
error.permissionAction: Grant access, then return to the app to continue saving.
error.noTranscriptReason: The ZIP does not include the WhatsApp _chat.txt transcript.
error.noTranscriptAction: Export the chat again with media included, then try the new ZIP.
error.noMediaReason: The export did not include supported media files.
error.noMediaAction: Use WhatsApp export chat with media included.
error.unsupportedZipReason: The app could not read this ZIP as a WhatsApp export.
error.unsupportedZipAction: Try another export ZIP from WhatsApp.
error.storageReason: Android could not prepare the temporary files needed for import.
error.storageAction: Try again, or choose the ZIP from device storage.
error.parsingReason: The app could not finish reading this export.
error.parsingAction: Try another ZIP. Technical details are below if needed.
